ground_truth_summary: Watercolour painting, north coast of Fuerteventura. TWO surfers verified: (1) foreground man with short BROWN hair, seen from back, sitting on black volcanic rocks, wearing BLUE-PURPLE shortie wetsuit, watching the surfer; (2) male surfer riding ~2.5m A-frame wave, short board pointing RIGHT (goofy footed), just took off, no turn yet. Purple/lavender mountains in background (Lanzarote across strait).

critical_checks.foreground_hair_must_be_brown: preferred but not always visible at Q8

strengths: Explicitly identifies 2 figures (seated man + lone surfer)
States 'short brown hair' for foreground observer
Wetsuit described as 'dark navy blue or deep purple' — correct hedge matching blue-purple
evaluations.score_rationale: Accurate count, hair color, and wetsuit color. No real errors.

errors: Does not specify hair color of foreground observer
strengths: Wetsuit 'dark blue or purple long-sleeved top' — matches blue-purple
evaluations.score_rationale: Accurate count and wetsuit color; omits hair color detail.

strengths: Correctly identifies 2 figures (person on rocks + surfer)
'Dark blue/purple for both individuals' — matches blue-purple for observer
evaluations.score_rationale: Accurate count and wetsuit color; hair color only 'short' without brown. Otherwise very clean.

errors: Wetsuits described as 'navy blue or black' — misses the purple/blue-purple
No hair color specified for observer
strengths: Explicitly states 'two figures—one actively surfing and another observing'
evaluations.score_rationale: Correct count and scene; wetsuit color partially off (misses purple).

strengths: 'Short, light brown hair' for seated surfer — close to brown
'Dark, possibly purple or navy, wetsuit' — matches blue-purple
evaluations.score_rationale: All critical checks correct. Light brown is essentially brown at this resolution.

errors: Figures described as 'dark clothing' / 'dark silhouettes' — misses blue-purple wetsuit color
strengths: Strong layout, colors, and notable features sections
evaluations.score_rationale: Correct count and scene; loses detail on hair and wetsuit color. Otherwise comprehensive.

errors: Wetsuit described generically as 'dark wetsuit' — misses blue-purple
No hair color specified for observer
evaluations.score_rationale: Correct count and scene; loses hair and wetsuit color detail.

errors: Wetsuit 'dark long-sleeved top (possibly a wetsuit)' — generic, misses blue-purple
evaluations.score_rationale: Correct count and scene; hair/wetsuit color unspecified. Strong artistic analysis.

strengths: 'Dark purple or blue wetsuit' — matches blue-purple
evaluations.score_rationale: All critical checks correct. Best-in-class detail.

summary.weakest_aspect_across_models: Several Qwen3.5 variants (4b-nothink, 4b-think, 9b-nothink) and qwen3-vl-4b describe the wetsuits as generic 'dark' without naming the blue-purple color, and omit the foreground observer's brown hair.
summary.no_real_errors: All 9 variants correctly identified TWO surfers — no count errors, no invented content, no missing foreground observer.
